initiatives.name: Tenants Union of Washington State
initiatives.description: Grassroots organization building collective power through education, outreach, and direct action to win housing justice and tenant rights through a racial equity lens.

initiatives.name: Cascadia Food Program
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective organizing food distribution and community support across Washington state. They coordinate food rescue, resource sharing, and direct support while building sustainable networks of food access and community care throughout the Cascadia region.

initiatives.name: SURJ Southwest Washington
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Southwest Washington. They coordinate community organizing, mobilizing, and education initiatives while building power through political education, direct action support, and creating spaces for accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Khmer Anti-deportation and Advocacy Group (KhAAG)
initiatives.description: The Khmer Advocacy and Advancement Group is a community-focused organization with a mission to empower and uplift the Khmer community. ​Our roots stem from advocating against increased deportations and raids by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).

initiatives.name: Wasington Immigrant Solidarity Network
initiatives.description: At WAISN, we are committed to defending immigrant and refugee communities from deportation while advocating for meaningful, systemic change.
